title: codia belepensis
intro: Codia belepensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the island of New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. Codia belepensis is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and improve overall health by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. It is often prepared as a tea or infusion for oral consumption, and may also be used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules or extracts.
